summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DIS is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $101.62. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 18.2%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $110.80 and a significant trendline confluence around $104.96 (formed by 10 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
